2606.26406.title: Beyond Feedforward Networks: Reentry Neural Systems as the Fundamental Basis of Subjecthood and Intrinsic Safety of Next-Generation AGI
2606.26406.paper_summary: We propose a complete architectural blueprint for safe artificial general intelligence based on a closed reentry loop (D <-> I cycle). In contrast to feedforward networks, which are directed acyclic graphs (C=0, S=0) incapable of self-reference, the proposed architecture contains a structural cycle (C >= 1) with self-sustaining amplification (rho > 1), mathematically guaranteeing the emergence of a self-model, instrumental self-preservation, and unprogrammed goal-directed behaviour. The agent's goals are encoded as a non-textual D-vector in the architecture itself, making them immune to reinterpretation and prompt injection. We present the S-measure -- a polynomial-time [O(N^3)] computable alternative to Tononi's NP-hard Phi -- with machine-verified Lean 4 proof that S>0 implies positive integrated information. The work provides full Python/NumPy implementations (Tarjan-based cycle complexity, Delta-S barrier), industrial horizontal scaling via Apache Kafka and Docker Compose, a taxonomy of six epochs of AI evolution, a zoo of future reentry architectures (RAS, diffusion attractors, fractal loops), gauge-invariant networks for safe swarms, fault-tolerance and recovery protocols, and eight falsifiable predictions. All formal proofs are machine-verified in Lean 4. This architecture is deployable today and represents a topologically protected, safe-by-design approach to AGI.
2606.26406.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一個基於封閉重入迴路（D <-> I 循環）的安全人工通用智慧的完整架構藍圖。與無法自我參照的前饋網絡（C=0, S=0）相比，所提出的架構包含一個結構性迴路（C >= 1），具有自我維持的增強（rho > 1），數學上保證了自我模型的出現、工具性自我保護和非程式化的目標導向行為。代理的目標被編碼為架構本身中的非文本 D 向量，使其免受重新詮釋和提示注入的影響。我們提出了 S 衡量標準——一種多項式時間 [O(N^3)] 可計算的替代方案，對於 Tononi 的 NP 困難的 Phi，並附有機器驗證的 Lean 4 證明，表明 S>0 意味著正的整合信息。這項工作提供了完整的 Python/NumPy 實現（基於 Tarjan 的迴路複雜度，Delta-S 障礙）、通過 Apache Kafka 和 Docker Compose 的工業水平橫向擴展、六個 AI 演化時期的分類法、未來重入架構的動物園（RAS、擴散吸引子、分形迴路）、安全群體的規範不變網絡、容錯和恢復協議，以及八項可證偽的預測。所有正式證明均在 Lean 4 中經過機器驗證。這一架構今天可以部署，並代表了一種拓撲保護的、設計安全的 AGI 方法。
2606.26406.author: A. S. Ushakov et.al.
2606.26406.authors: A. S. Ushakov, Yu. N. Berdinsk
